next_steps: Perform urgent CT angiography of the chest, abdomen, and pelvis with contrast to evaluate for expansion or rupture of the aortic pseudoaneurysm
Perform transesophageal echocardiography to evaluate for vegetation or abscess related to infective endocarditis
Obtain follow-up serial blood cultures to document clearance of Staphylococcus aureus bacteremia
Initiate urgent vascular surgery and infectious disease consultation
Continue targeted antibiotic therapy for methicillin-sensitive Staphylococcus aureus (MSSA) as guided by susceptibility results
